name: sysinfo
description: Complete PCM 3.1 diagnostic: version, VIN, processes, network, CVALUE/FSC, a full restorable /HBpersistence backup, dev tools inventory, BT/AUX-fix + audio-source state, and a full hardware/IPC/CAN/DSI + service-broker device-tree probe. Read-only, no changes to car.
author: dspl1236
